title: Phase 8B: Collections UI - aging dashboard, accounts, call log, promises, disputes
description: Build collections UI: aging dashboard with bucket charts, my accounts page, account detail page with contact history, call log form, promise-to-pay form and tracker, dispute form, payment plan builder, escalation queue, credit hold controls, and collector performance dashboard.
steps: Create src/app/(dashboard)/collections/page.tsx with aging dashboard (bucket breakdown, charts, KPIs)
Create src/app/(dashboard)/collections/accounts/[id]/page.tsx with account detail (contact history, promises, disputes, payment plans, memos)
Create src/components/collections/call-log-form.tsx with call logging form and history display
Create src/components/collections/promise-form.tsx with promise-to-pay creation and tracking
Create src/components/collections/dispute-form.tsx with dispute creation and aging tracker
